summary: Phase 0 discovery for Captains Fish and Chicken (1616 1st Ave NE, Cedar Rapids, IA 52402). A probe-guided web-footprint sweep across 23 sources (executed 2026-07-09 by a prior worker, detail in web-footprint-findings.json) confirms consistent NAP, a live owned website at https://captains-fish-chicken.netlify.app (launched 2026-07-08 by this engagement, not yet SERP-indexed), aggregator-consistent but owner-unconfirmed hours, and stale third-party listings for the excluded 3100 6th St SW address (now Pita Kabab). Owner-declared statements are carried from the sealed brief; no live owner interview occurred in this run. Seven residue items remain open in owner-questionnaire.md; none blocks Phase 0. No build output was created.

interviewSummary: No live owner interview occurred in this run. Owner-declared statements were carried from the sealed engagement brief (D:\website\captains-fish-and-chicken\brief.json, provenance: engagement owner, RUN v3 2026-07-09): full priced menu supplied as paste (2026-07-07), call-only contact policy (no lead form, no SMS), Google 4.4/208 citation citable with attribution, shark-captain logo in navy/gold (file drop pending, placeholder live), home-page style must match interior pages, hours owner-unconfirmed (conservative structured hours with caveated display text), 3100 6th St SW excluded (now Pita Kabab, same owner), real identity fixed at https://captains-fish-chicken.netlify.app / captainsfishchicken@gmail.com / GA4 G-7W35DKNK6Z. The residue-only interview was deferred to owner-questionnaire.md: seven open items (hours confirmation, Gazette sides delta, logo file drop, stale SW-listing cleanup authorization, GBP website field, custom-domain decision, contact-policy reconfirmation) with unblock paths; per the sweep, owners are not re-asked anything the web already answered. CRO capture per the skill's omit-never-fabricate rule: no offers, financing partners, or trust-grid minimum of six facts exist in owner materials or web sources, so site.offers, site.financing, and the trust grid are omitted; no lead-form endpoint and no SMS number exist because the owner policy is call-only, so no lead form or sms: CTA ships; no Google Ads config declared, so analytics stays GA4-only.

findings: NAP is consistent across all in-scope sources: Captains Fish and Chicken, 1616 1st Ave NE, Cedar Rapids, IA 52402, (319) 221-1040.

The business now HAS a live owned web presence: https://captains-fish-chicken.netlify.app (launched 2026-07-08 by this engagement, verified live 2026-07-09) - the headline change versus all prior sweeps.
The owned site is not yet visible in SERP index checks (one day post-launch); aggregators (res-discover) still outrank it and claim official-site status.
Aggregator/mirror hours agree (Mon-Thu 11AM-10PM, Fri-Sat 11AM-11PM, Sun 11AM-8PM) but remain owner-unconfirmed; the live site correctly caveats them.
Google rating mirrored at 4.4 stars; Wanderlog mirror shows 192 reviews versus the owner-cited 208 (2026-07-07) - rating value consistent, count differs, mirror likely stale.
Facebook page active with 100% recommend across 17 reviews (SERP snapshot).
Press (KHAK 2024-10-28): owner Ray Aqel, first Iowa location, opened Oct 2024 in the former Gutamex/Brick City Grill space, fresh-to-order model previously run in MN/IL/MI.

Menu breadth corroborated by press and aggregators: fried chicken, tenders, wings, gizzards, perch, tilapia, catfish, cod, calamari, crab cakes, shrimp; sides okra, hush puppies, onion rings, breaded mushrooms, fries, mac & cheese; desserts banana pudding, lemon cake, chocolate cake.
One SERP summary mentioned an 'estimated health score of 98 out of 100' - origin unverified aggregator metric; excluded from site use.
Delivery coverage for the NE location: DoorDash, Uber Eats, Postmates, Grubhub, and Seamless all list the store.
discrepancies: Stale SW-location listings: Yelp SW ('Captains Fish and Chicken, 3100 6th St SW (Seafood)' - live, 'Updated March 2026'), Grubhub SW ('Captains Fish and Chicken, 3100 6th St SW' - live store 11805992), and WanderBoat ('Captains Fish and Chicken INC, 3100 6th St SW 52404') still carry live Captains listings at 3100 6th St SW, but that address is now Pita Kabab (Mediterranean, same owner, phone (319) 440-3709, since ~late 2025) - risk of customer and AI-answer confusion between locations. Resolution: owner action required to request closure/'moved' status on the stale SW listings; site-side disambiguation content already stands; SW stays out of scope.

Google review count: owner cited 4.4 stars / 208 reviews (brief.json, 2026-07-07, carried on the live site with attribution) vs Wanderlog Google-mirror showing 4.4 stars / 192 reviews (checked 2026-07-09) - rating value agrees, count differs, mirror snapshot age unknown. Resolution: non-blocking; keep the on-site citation attributed and dated as owner-provided; refresh from GBP directly at the next owner touchpoint.

Official-website claim by aggregator: res-discover claims official-site status at captains-fish-and-chicken.res-discover.com while the true owned site is https://captains-fish-chicken.netlify.app (live, engagement-launched). Resolution: owner action to set the GBP website field to the owned URL (and any future custom domain); consider requesting correction/removal of the aggregator claim.

Hours confirmation: aggregators (GBP mirror, res-discover, Wanderlog) all agree on Mon-Thu 11AM-10PM, Fri-Sat 11AM-11PM, Sun 11AM-8PM, but the owner has never confirmed hours directly (owner value: unconfirmed - call-to-confirm stance stands); structured-data hours on the live site remain conservative (Mon-Thu + Sun) with caveated display text. Resolution: keep the call-to-confirm caveat until the owner confirms; questionnaire item remains open.
ownerResidueQuestions: Confirm the weekly hours (aggregators show Mon-Thu 11-10, Fri-Sat 11-11, Sun 11-8) so structured hours can drop the conservative caveat.
Gazette sides delta: does the printed sides list match the current menu paste (2026-07-07)? Menu ships as paste until answered.
Logo file drop: the shark-captain logo file (navy/gold) is still pending; a placeholder is live.
Authorize/ask Yelp and Grubhub to close or mark moved the stale 3100 6th St SW 'Captains' listings (now Pita Kabab).
Set the GBP website field to https://captains-fish-chicken.netlify.app (accelerates indexing; counters the res-discover official-site claim).
Any plan for a custom domain to replace the netlify.app subdomain?
Confirm call-only remains the contact policy (no lead form, no SMS) - unchanged from the owner's declaration.
